# A309370 a(14) >= 257: Sidon set in {0,1}^14, integer componentwise addition.
# 257 vectors, one per line (bit position 0 first). no value recorded on OEIS for this n.
# Independently re-verified: all C(257,2)+257 pairwise sums distinct.
